subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath set in motion the celestial spheres in the heaven of divine knowledge through the winds of His Will, invoked by His Name, the All-Merciful. When these were stirred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی حرک افلاک سماء العرفان من اریاح اراده اسمه الرحمن فلما تحرک
subcodes.subjects: @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @business; financial; property matters, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @light and darkness
